https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/infrastru.title: Infrastructure work completed in preparation of geothermal drilling in Mataloko, Indonesia
https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/infrastru.plain_summary: Infrastructure work has been finished at the Mataloko geothermal project in Indonesia, getting the site ready for the drilling phase—the process of boring deep holes into the earth to reach hot rock formations that can generate electricity.

https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/omv-and-e.title: OMV and Energie Steiermark announce joint geothermal project in Graz, Austria
https://www.thinkgeoenergy.com/omv-and-e.plain_summary: Two energy companies, OMV and Energie Steiermark, have partnered to develop a geothermal heating project in Graz, Austria. They plan to begin exploration drilling—the process of drilling deep into the earth to locate and access hot rock resources—by the end of 2026.

https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBM.title: Fervo Energy Adapts Oil Drilling Techniques to Develop Universal Geothermal Energy Solution - CPG Click Oil and Gas
https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBM.plain_summary: Fervo Energy is using drilling methods originally developed for oil extraction to create a new approach to superhot rock geothermal energy, which taps into extremely hot rock deep underground to generate electricity. By adapting proven drilling technology, the company aims to make geothermal energy more widely available and practical across different geological locations.
